sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الأَسْوَاقُ الشَّعْبِيَّةُ فِي المُدُنِ العَرَبِيَّةِ القَدِيمَةِ، مِثْلَ سُوقِ الحَمِيدِيَّةِ أَوْ خَانِ الخَلِيلِيِّ، قَلْبَ الحَيَاةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ وَالِاقْتِصَادِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Narodne pijace u starim arapskim gradovima, poput pijace Al-Hamidiyah ili Khan el-Khalili, smatraju se srcem društvenog i ekonomskog života.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional markets in ancient Arab cities, such as Al-Hamidiyah Souq or Khan el-Khalili, are considered the heart of social and economic life.

sentences.arabic: حِينَمَا تَتَجَوَّلُ فِي أَزِقَّتِهَا الضَّيِّقَةِ، تَسْتَنْشِقُ رَائِحَةَ التَّوَابِلِ الزَّكِيَّةِ وَالبَخُورِ الَّتِي تَمْلأُ الأَجْوَاءَ بِسِحْرِ الشَّرْقِ.
sentences.translation: Dok šetate njihovim uskim uličicama, udišete miris ugodnih začina i tamjana koji ispunjavaju atmosferu čarima Orijenta.
sentences.translationEn: As you wander through their narrow alleys, you inhale the scent of pleasant spices and incense that fill the atmosphere with the magic of the Orient.

sentences.arabic: تَعْرِضُ هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقُ مَصْنُوعَاتٍ يَدَوِيَّةً تَقْلِيدِيَّةً، مِنَ النُّحَاسِيَّاتِ المَنْقُوشَةِ إِلَى السَّجَّادِ المَنْسُوجِ بِحِرَفِيَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove pijace izlažu tradicionalne rukotvorine, od graviranog bakra do vješto tkanih tepiha.
sentences.translationEn: These markets display traditional handicrafts, from engraved copperware to skillfully woven carpets.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَقْتَصِرُ النَّشَاطُ هُنَاكَ عَلَى البَيْعِ وَالشِّرَاءِ، بَلْ هُوَ مَكَانٌ لِتَبَادُلِ الأَخْبَارِ وَتَنَاوُلِ الشَّايِ مَعَ التُّجَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Aktivnost tamo nije ograničena samo na kupovinu i prodaju, već je to mjesto za razmjenu vijesti i ispijanje čaja sa trgovcima.
sentences.translationEn: Activity there is not limited to buying and selling; it is also a place for exchanging news and drinking tea with merchants.

sentences.arabic: يَعْكِسُ التَّفَاوُضُ عَلَى الأَسْعَارِ، أَوْ مَا يُسَمَّى 'المُسَاوَمَةَ'، جُزْءًا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ المَحَلِّيَّةِ وَطَرِيقَةً لِبِنَاءِ العَلَاقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Pregovaranje o cijenama, ili ono što se naziva 'cjenkanje', odražava dio lokalne kulture i način za izgradnju odnosa.
sentences.translationEn: Negotiating prices, or what is called 'bargaining,' reflects part of the local culture and a way to build relationships.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ زِيَارَةَ هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقِ تَمْنَحُ السَّائِحَ فُرْصَةً لِلغَوْصِ فِي أَعْمَاقِ التَّارِيخِ وَمُعَايَشَةِ التَّقَالِيدِ الحَيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjeta ovim pijacama pruža turisti priliku da zaroni u dubine historije i doživi žive tradicije.
sentences.translationEn: Visiting these markets gives the tourist a chance to dive into the depths of history and experience living traditions.
